$comment: Per-dimension judge enforcement (PLAN-004 AC-4). A dimension may be 'blocking' ONLY if it cites a calibration report that evals/harness/promotion-check.mjs accepts: report exists, is <=90 days old, and its per-dimension promoteEligible is true (judge-vs-reference kappa >= threshold; human dimensions also require human-vs-human kappa >= 0.4). Judges START advisory. Do not hand-flip a dimension to 'blocking' without a report — CI (promotion-check) will reject it.
